title: OreCrafter
description: Have you ever wanted to craft ores without a silk touch pickaxe? Well, now you can!
body: craft **ORES**! this mod adds _bits_, a new item used for crafting ores! (Redstone uses **blocks** x2 with 2 stone blocks and iron, copper and gold use 2 raw blocks with 2 stone). craft deepslate versions with any ore + deepslate in a crafting table (or inventory). currently only supports **_Neo-Forge 1.21.1_**
